burden.mortalityRate: 0.1% (linked to suicide; 800,000 suicides/year globally, ~20% depression-related in EU)
burden.source: WHO Global Burden of Disease Study

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: ~20-30% (varies by country; routine in primary care in Nordic countries)
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: ~50% (remission with treatment; access barriers reduce effectiveness)

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: EMA-approved treatments (SSRIs like sertraline, SNRIs, psychotherapy; guidelines from NICE/ESCAP)
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Stigma, rural access disparities, workforce shortages in mental health
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Advanced pharmacotherapy, integrated care models in countries like Sweden/Netherlands, EU-wide awareness campaigns
